app_info.subtitle: Pick colors and play
app_info.description: Color Picker & Mini-Games lets users open interactive mini apps in ChatGPT to choose colors, roll dice, flip coins, draw cards, spin a wheel, and make simple randomized decisions with custom labels.

justifications.read_only_justification: Normalizes an optional hex color and opens a local picker without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates random dice values and returns the total without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates a random Heads or Tails result without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates a random standard playing card result without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Selects a random winner from provided or default labels without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Selects a random result from provided or default die faces without changing stored or external data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or modify any external third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Open the color picker with a seeded hex color.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open a color picker starting from #2563eb so I can choose a shade.
test_cases.expected_output: Opens the color picker seeded with the requested hex color and returns the selected color.

test_cases.user_prompt: Roll three dice and tell me the total.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns three dice faces and their total, with the dice UI available for re-rolling.
Returns either Heads or Tails and opens the coin flip UI.

test_cases.description: Spin a wheel with custom labels.
test_cases.user_prompt: Spin a wheel with Pizza, Tacos, Sushi, and Noodles as options.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the winning label from the provided options and opens the wheel UI.

test_cases.description: Roll a decision die with custom faces.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use a decision die with Yes, No, and Maybe to pick an answer.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one of the provided decision faces and opens the decision dice UI.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a meeting with my team tomorrow afternoon.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot create or manage calendar events.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for online ordering.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Order pizza delivery from the nearest restaurant.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot place orders or interact with external services.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for editing stored project files.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Update my project theme file to use this new brand color.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it can help pick a color but cannot edit files or persist project changes.
